---
title: "Popular History of France from the Earliest Period to the Death of Louis XIV"
---

## Popular History of France from the Earliest Period to the Death of Louis XIV

**Author:** Elizabeth Missing Sewell
**Date:** 1876
**Imprint:** London: Longman

### Notes

See also [[person:1301]Elizabeth Sewell].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
